summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CRM/Admin platform для автобізнесу with SLA breach detection, escalation engine, and deposit auto-flow functionality

minor_bugs.issue: Manual SLA check endpoints return status 201 instead of expected 200
minor_bugs.impact: Cosmetic issue - functionality works correctly, returns success: true

passed_tests: Login flow with admin@crm.com / admin123 credentials
SLA Config API - returns all configuration fields (callback/lead SLA timings)
SLA Stats API - returns proper structure with breach statistics
SLA Breaches API - returns active breaches list
SLA Manager Breaches API - returns breaches by manager
Dashboard page loads with comprehensive Control Dashboard
SLA Control section displays metrics (overdue leads/tasks/callbacks)
Lead Flow section shows lead status counts
Workload management section with manager info
Staff page navigation with List and Performance tabs
Settings page with multiple configuration tabs
All basic CRUD endpoints (Staff, Documents, Settings, Tasks, Deposits)
Navigation between all main sections works correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor fix needed: Update SLA manual check endpoints (/api/sla/check/callbacks and /api/sla/check/leads) to return status 200 instead of 201 for consistency
